---
title: "Model_diagnostics"
output: html_document
---
```{r}
pacman::p_load(here, cmdstanr, tidyverse, posterior, bayesplot)
```

```{r}
#Make list of files to loop through


wba_fits <- list.files(
  here("scenario_data"),
  pattern = "^wba_model.*\\.rds$",
  recursive = TRUE,
  full.names = TRUE
)

pba_fits <- list.files(
  here("scenario_data"),
  pattern = "^pba_model.*\\.rds$",
  recursive = TRUE,
  full.names = TRUE
)

```

```{r}
i <- 1

for (file in wba_fits) {
  
  fit <- readRDS(file)
  
  # Diagnostics summary
  print(fit$diagnostic_summary())
  
  # Trace plots
  print(mcmc_trace(fit$draws(), pars = "kappa"))
  print(mcmc_trace(fit$draws(), pars = "rho"))
  
  # Rank plots
  print(mcmc_rank_overlay(fit$draws(), pars = "kappa"))
  print(mcmc_rank_overlay(fit$draws(), pars = "rho"))
  
  # Summary table (saved separately)
  fit_summary <- fit$summary(c("kappa", "rho"))
  
  assign(paste0("wba_summary_", i), fit_summary, envir = .GlobalEnv)
  
  i <- i + 1
}
```

```{r}
for (file in pba_fits) {
  
  fit <- readRDS(file)
  
  # Diagnostics summary
  print(fit$diagnostic_summary())
  
  # Trace plots
  print(mcmc_trace(fit$draws(), pars = "p"))

  # Rank plots
  print(mcmc_rank_overlay(fit$draws(), pars = "p"))
  
  # Summary table
  fit_summary <- fit$summary(variables = c("p"))
  print(fit_summary %>% select(variable, mean, rhat, ess_bulk, ess_tail))
}
```
```{r}
fit$summary()
```
